title: MCP Tool
description: A callable function exposed by an MCP server. Tools have a JSON Schema 2020-12 input schema and are invoked via tools/call.

description.description: Natural-language description of what the tool does. Untrusted unless the server is trusted.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema 2020-12 describing the tool's input parameters.

outputSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema describing structured tool output.

annotations.description: Optional behavioral hints for clients (e.g. readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, idempotentHint, openWorldHint).
